nodes.name: Admin Dashboard
nodes.description: Main dashboard page showing platform statistics, revenue charts, and subscription metrics. Features auth check for admin/editor roles.

nodes.name: Admin Listings
nodes.description: Listing management page with category CRUD operations. Uses Astro Actions for admin.categories.create/update/delete.

nodes.name: Admin Users
nodes.description: User management page for admin operations. Supports search, role filtering, and user CRUD via Astro Actions.

nodes.name: Admin Categories
nodes.description: Category management page supporting 4 entity types (business, nonprofit, public_sector, listing). Features tabbed UI, filters, and modal CRUD.

nodes.name: Admin Media Library
nodes.description: Server-rendered media library page with pagination, filtering by entityType and category. Uses Drizzle ORM with media and users schema.

nodes.name: Admin Reviews
nodes.description: Review management page with pagination, search, and rating filters. Supports delete via /api/admin/reviews/:id API.

nodes.name: Admin Settings
nodes.description: Site settings management page for site_name, contact_email, contact_phone, and payment_info (QR code).

nodes.name: Admin AI Tools
nodes.description: AI-powered content generation page supporting 4 generators: Listing, SKU/Product, Blog Article, and Landing Page. Uses MiniMax API integration.

nodes.name: Admin Service Packages
nodes.description: Subscription plan management page for business_page, listing, and ad_banner packages. Supports variant management with pricing tiers.

nodes.name: Admin Blog Posts
nodes.description: Blog post management with TipTap rich text editor, media upload with video compression, and full SEO settings (meta title, description, canonical URL).

nodes.name: Admin Layout
nodes.description: Main admin layout with responsive sidebar navigation. Includes mobile menu, theme toggle, logout functionality, and active nav highlighting.

nodes.name: Toast Store
nodes.description: Nanostores-based toast notification system with auto-dismiss. Supports success/error/info/warning types with 3-second default duration.

nodes.name: Auth Store
nodes.description: Client-side authentication state using Nanostores. Manages userId, userName, userRole with localStorage/sessionStorage persistence.

nodes.name: Admin Navigation Structure
nodes.description: Navigation links: Dashboard, Orders, Listings, Businesses, Non-Profits, Gov & NGOs, AI Tools, Users, Products, Categories, Ad Banners, Blog Posts, Media, Service Packages, Settings

nodes.name: Business Listing API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning paginated list of businesses with search, category, and sorting capabilities. Includes rate limiting, caching, and filtering for live/published status.

nodes.name: getCachedResponse
nodes.summary: Retrieves a cached response from Cloudflare Cache API if available.

nodes.name: cacheResponse
nodes.summary: Caches a response in Cloudflare Cache with specified TTL for public caching.

nodes.name: getClientIP
nodes.summary: Extracts client IP from Cloudflare or forwarded headers.

nodes.name: Business Detail API
nodes.summary: GET/PUT endpoint for single business by slug. GET returns business details with products and reviews. PUT requires auth and ownership for updates. Implements Cloudflare caching and rate limiting.

nodes.name: getCachedResponse
nodes.summary: Retrieves cached response from Cloudflare Cache for single business.

nodes.name: cacheResponse
nodes.summary: Caches business response with TTL in Cloudflare Cache.

nodes.name: purgeCache
nodes.summary: Deletes cached business response after updates.

nodes.name: Featured Businesses API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning top 8 featured businesses ordered by engagement score (likes*3 + saves*1 + views*0.01). Includes category names and production caching.

nodes.name: GET /api/businesses
nodes.summary: List all businesses with pagination, search, category filter, and sorting options (recent, popular, name). Supports rate limiting and Cloudflare caching for non-search queries.

nodes.name: GET /api/businesses/:slug
nodes.summary: Get single business by slug with full details, products, and reviews. Cached for 60 seconds with 404 caching.

nodes.name: PUT /api/businesses/:slug
nodes.summary: Update business details. Requires authentication and ownership. Supports partial updates and cache purging.

nodes.name: GET /api/businesses/featured
nodes.summary: Get top 8 featured businesses by engagement score with caching.

nodes.name: Categories API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning categories filtered by entity type (business, nonprofit, public_sector, listing). Supports caching in production.

nodes.name: getCategoryTable
nodes.summary: Returns the appropriate category table based on entity type.

nodes.name: GET /api/categories
nodes.summary: List categories by entity type with caching. Supports business, nonprofit, public_sector, and listing types.

nodes.name: Products & Services API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning products and services with optional filtering by businessId and active status. Parses JSON fields for specifications and images.

nodes.name: GET /api/products-services
nodes.summary: List products/services with optional businessId filter and active status filtering. Parses JSON fields.

nodes.name: SKU Usage API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning current SKU count and remaining limit based on business subscription plan. Used for plan quota enforcement.

nodes.name: GET /api/products/:businessPageId/sku-usage
nodes.summary: Get current SKU count and remaining limit based on business plan slug.

nodes.name: Admin Users API
nodes.summary: Admin-only GET endpoint for listing all users with pagination, search, and role filtering. Requires admin authentication via getAdminUser.

nodes.name: GET /api/admin/users
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint to list all users with pagination, search by email/name, and role filtering.

nodes.name: Admin Businesses API
nodes.summary: Admin-only GET endpoint for listing all businesses with pagination, search, status and planType filtering. Uses publishDate for ordering.

nodes.name: GET /api/admin/businesses
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint to list all businesses with search, status and planType filtering.

nodes.name: Admin Non-Profits API
nodes.summary: Admin-only GET endpoint for listing all non-profits with pagination, search, and status filtering.

nodes.name: GET /api/admin/non-profits
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint to list all non-profits with search and status filtering.

nodes.name: Admin Public Sectors API
nodes.summary: Admin-only GET endpoint for listing all public sectors with pagination, search, and status filtering.

nodes.name: GET /api/admin/public-sectors
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint to list all public sectors with search and status filtering.

nodes.name: Admin Media API
nodes.summary: Admin-only GET endpoint for listing all media records with pagination and optional type filtering (business, blog, general).

nodes.name: GET /api/admin/media
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint to list all media with type filtering and pagination.

nodes.name: Admin Stats API
nodes.summary: Admin-only GET endpoint returning dashboard statistics including total counts for users, businesses, non-profits, products, categories, plus MTD revenue and monthly data for charts.

nodes.name: GET /api/admin/stats
nodes.summary: Admin endpoint returning dashboard stats: total users/businesses/non-profits/products/categories, MTD metrics, and 6-month revenue chart data.

nodes.name: Session API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint for retrieving current user session. Reads session directly from KV store and queries database for user role. Validates session expiry.

nodes.name: GET /api/auth/session
nodes.summary: Get current user session from KV store with database role lookup. Returns user info, role, and session details.

nodes.name: Account Businesses API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint for user to retrieve their owned businesses. Requires authentication with rate limiting by client IP.

nodes.name: requireAuth
nodes.summary: Validates session cookie and returns authenticated user or unauthorized response.

nodes.name: GET /api/account/businesses/:uid
nodes.summary: Get user's owned businesses with category names. Requires auth and respects rate limits.

nodes.name: Account Profile API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint for retrieving user profile by ID with rate limiting.

nodes.name: GET /api/account/profile/:uid
nodes.summary: Get user profile by ID including name, email, phone, image, role. Requires auth check via rate limiting.

nodes.name: Account Subscription API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint for retrieving user subscription/orders with business titles and active subscription detection.

nodes.name: GET /api/account/subscription/:uid
nodes.summary: Get user's subscription orders with business titles, variant names, and active subscription status.

nodes.name: Subscriptions API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint for listing user's orders/subscriptions. Requires authentication via session cookie. Returns orders with business titles.

nodes.name: GET /api/subscriptions
nodes.summary: List user's subscription orders with business titles. Requires authentication.

nodes.name: Blog API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning recent 50 blog posts ordered by creation date.

nodes.name: GET /api/blog
nodes.summary: Get recent 50 blog posts ordered by creation date.

nodes.name: Non-Profits Listing API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning paginated list of non-profits with search, category, and sorting. Includes rate limiting and filtering for live/published status.

nodes.name: getClientIP
nodes.summary: Extracts client IP from Cloudflare or forwarded headers.

nodes.name: GET /api/non-profits
nodes.summary: List non-profits with pagination, search, category filter, and sorting (recent, popular, name).

nodes.name: Public Sectors Listing API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning paginated list of public sectors with search, category, and sorting. Includes rate limiting and filtering for live/published status.

nodes.name: getClientIP
nodes.summary: Extracts client IP from Cloudflare or forwarded headers.

nodes.name: GET /api/public-sectors
nodes.summary: List public sectors with pagination, search, category filter, and sorting (recent, popular, name).

nodes.name: Active Banners API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning up to 5 active ad banners with image URLs and link information.

nodes.name: GET /api/banners/active
nodes.summary: Get up to 5 active ad banners with image URLs and link information.

nodes.name: Public Settings API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning public site settings (e.g., payment QR code) without authentication.

nodes.name: GET /api/settings/public
nodes.summary: Get public site settings including payment QR code. No authentication required.

nodes.name: Service Packages API
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning active service packages ordered by sort order. Supports Cloudflare caching with 5-minute TTL.

nodes.name: GET /api/service-packages
nodes.summary: Get active service packages ordered by sort order with 5-minute caching.

nodes.name: Scheduled Cleanup Job
nodes.summary: Cloudflare Workers scheduled handler running weekly to delete expired businesses after 60-day grace period. Cascades deletion to R2 files, media records, and products.

nodes.name: Scheduled: Cleanup Expired Businesses
nodes.summary: Weekly cleanup handler that deletes expired businesses after grace period, including R2 files, media, and products.

nodes.name: Cleanup Expired API
nodes.summary: GET/POST endpoint for deleting businesses past grace period. Requires authorization header with secret token for cron triggering.

nodes.name: GET /api/scheduled/cleanup-expired
nodes.summary: Delete businesses past grace period. Requires Bearer token authentication.

nodes.name: POST /api/scheduled/cleanup-expired
nodes.summary: Delete businesses past grace period (POST for easier cron triggering).

nodes.name: Cleanup Orphan Media API
nodes.summary: Cloudflare Workers scheduled handler running weekly (Sunday 3AM UTC) to clean orphan media records. Deletes R2 files where D1 record exists but file is missing.

nodes.name: Scheduled: Cleanup Orphan Media
nodes.summary: Weekly cleanup of orphan R2 media files. Runs Sunday at 3AM UTC.

nodes.name: Mark Expired API
nodes.summary: GET/POST endpoint for marking active subscriptions as expired and setting grace period end date. Requires authorization header with secret token.

nodes.name: GET /api/scheduled/mark-expired
nodes.summary: Mark active subscriptions as expired with grace period. Requires Bearer token.

nodes.name: POST /api/scheduled/mark-expired
nodes.summary: Mark active subscriptions as expired (POST for easier cron triggering).

nodes.name: Security Middleware
nodes.summary: Astro middleware that adds security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, X-XSS-Protection) to all responses and configures Cache-Control based on asset type.

nodes.name: Middleware Chain
nodes.summary: Security middleware applies headers to all HTTP responses with different caching strategies for static vs dynamic content.

nodes.name: astro.config.mjs
nodes.summary: Astro SSR configuration with Cloudflare Workers adapter, TailwindCSS integration, and Vite build settings for the TimorUp platform.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses defineConfig pattern with plugin composition for TailwindCSS and Cloudflare adapter.

nodes.name: wrangler.jsonc
nodes.summary: Cloudflare Workers deployment configuration defining D1 database, KV namespace for sessions, R2 bucket for media storage, and cron triggers for rate limit cleanup.
nodes.languageNotes: JSONC format supports comments, binds DB, SESSION, and MEDIA_BUCKET resources.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript strict mode configuration extending Astro's strict tsconfig with path aliases for modular imports and Cloudflare workers types.
nodes.languageNotes: Enables strict TypeScript flags including noUncheckedIndexedAccess and isolatedDeclarations.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: NPM package manifest defining dependencies for Astro, Drizzle ORM, better-auth, Mastra AI, TailwindCSS, and development tooling with pnpm as package manager.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines comprehensive scripts for dev, build, test, and database operations.

nodes.name: drizzle.config.json
nodes.summary: Drizzle ORM configuration for SQLite dialect using D1 HTTP driver, pointing to remote Cloudflare D1 database.

nodes.name: tailwind.config.js
nodes.summary: TailwindCSS 4 configuration file. The actual configuration is embedded in the Vite plugin setup in astro.config.mjs.
nodes.languageNotes: TailwindCSS v4 uses Vite plugin instead of PostCSS config file.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variable template documenting Cloudflare account, R2 storage, authentication secrets, and MiniMax AI API key configuration.

nodes.name: _routes.json
nodes.summary: Cloudflare Workers _routes.json configuration allowing all routes for the SPA build output.

nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI workflow running on push to main and pull requests, installing dependencies with pnpm and building for Cloudflare Workers.

nodes.name: deploy.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions deployment workflow triggered on push to main, building and deploying to Cloudflare Workers with post-deployment verification.

tour.title: Entry Point: The Homepage
tour.description: The journey begins at `src/pages/index.astro`. This is a Server-Side Rendered (SSR) page that fetches featured content from D1 and displays four entity types: Businesses, Listings (classified ads), Non-Profits, and Public Sectors. It uses the `getDb()` function to fetch data with cache headers for CDN optimization.

tour.title: Database Foundation: Unified Schema
tour.description: The heart of the platform is `src/db/schema/index.ts` - a unified Drizzle ORM schema with 677 lines defining all core tables: businesses, listings, nonProfits, publicSectors, users, products, reviews, orders, and more. Key relationships include businesses.ownerId -> users.id, and products.businessId -> businesses.id.

tour.title: Authentication: Better-Auth + KV Sessions
tour.description: User authentication flows through `src/lib/auth.ts` using the better-auth library with Cloudflare KV for session storage. The auth module provides `createAuthInstance()`, `getAuth()`, and `getOauthStatus()`. All auth queries in `src/lib/queries/auth.ts` use `initAuthInstance` to verify sessions via cookies.

tour.title: Data Access Layer: Query Functions
tour.description: Clean data access is provided through query modules in `src/lib/queries/` and `src/lib/db/queries/`. Each module returns Result<T, E> types for error handling. Key patterns: `getBusinessBySlug()`, `searchListings()`, `getReviewsByBusinessId()`. The `src/lib/queries/result.ts` module provides success(), error(), and unwrap() utilities.

tour.title: Form Actions: Server Mutations
tour.description: All form submissions go through Astro Server Actions in `src/actions/`. Auth actions handle signIn, signUp, signOut, verifyEmail, forgotPassword, resetPassword. Business actions manage create, update, and news updates. Admin actions provide CRUD for users, listings, categories, settings, subscriptions, and reviews. All actions use Zod validation.

tour.title: Media Storage: R2 + Cloudflare Images
tour.description: Media handling in `src/lib/media.ts` manages uploads to Cloudflare R2 bucket. Functions include `uploadToR2()`, `uploadImageToR2()` (with sharp processing), and `getOptimizedImageUrl()` which generates Cloudflare image transformation URLs. Media metadata is stored in the media table with entity associations.

tour.title: Subscriptions: Plan Limits & Access Control
tour.description: The subscription system in `src/lib/subscription.ts` enforces plan limits. Functions like `getPlanLimits()`, `canCreateSku()`, and `canEditBusiness()` check subscription status and grace periods. The `getSubscriptionDashboard()` provides batched subscription data. Plans are stored in servicePackages and ordered through the orders table.

tour.title: AI Tools: Content Generation
tour.description: The admin AI Tools page (`src/pages/admin/ai-tools.astro`) powers four generators: Listing Creator, SKU/Product Creator, Blog Generator, and Landing Page Creator. Configuration is centralized in `src/lib/ai/providers.ts` with `getModelConfig()` selecting between Mastra agents and Workers AI. Validation schemas in `src/lib/ai/validation.ts` use Zod v4 for structured outputs.

tour.title: Admin Dashboard: Platform Management
tour.description: The admin section at `/admin` provides full platform management. Pages include: Dashboard (analytics), Users (CRUD with role management), Listings (6 types: job/product/service/vehicle/property/wanted), Categories (4 entity types), Media Library, Reviews, Settings, Service Packages, and Blogs (with TipTap editor and video compression).

tour.title: Products & SKUs: Business Catalogs
tour.description: Each business can manage products/SKUs through `src/lib/db/queries/products.ts`. Functions include `getProductById()`, `getBusinessProducts()`, and `canCreateProduct()` which checks against subscription SKU limits. Products link to businesses via businessId and support featured status, categories, and image galleries.

tour.title: Rate Limiting & Security
tour.description: Security is enforced through `src/lib/rate-limit.ts` with dual strategies: KV-based rate limiting for distributed deployments (primary) and in-memory rate limiting for fallback. The `checkRateLimitKV()` function uses Cloudflare KV while `checkRateLimit()` provides synchronous checks. File validation uses Zod v4 in `src/lib/validation.ts` with `validateImageFile()` and `validateVideoFile()`.

tour.title: Reviews & Social Features
tour.description: User engagement through reviews system in `src/lib/queries/review.ts`. Functions include `getReviewsByBusinessId()` with pagination, `getReviewStats()`, `getUserReviewForBusiness()`, and `hasUserReviewed()`. Reviews link users to businesses and support admin replies. The `hasUserReviewed` check prevents duplicate reviews and the `getReviewStats` recalculates business ratings on delete.
